case_title: WILLIAMSON KELLY SEAN VS NGUYEN TRUNG THANH et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMSON KELLY SEAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NGUYEN TRUNG THANH NGUYEN ANN CHAUN PLAINTIFF COULD NOT CARRY BURDEN OF PROOF. ROBIN SUZUKAWA (FRIEND TO AID DEFT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WILLIAMSON KELLY SEAN AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN TRUNG THANH NGUYEN ANN CHAUN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-1995 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN TRUNG THANH
UNTIMELY POS ON TRUNG NGUYEN. ONE POS FOR TWO DEFTS. INVALID POS ON ANN NGUYEN.
